2: Fix premium video playback — session cookies now sent with all requests
3: Fix all videos broken — auth now only applied to content detail requests
4: Fix premium auth — capture laravel_session cookie specifically so Grayjay waits until post-login
5: Fix auth using cookiesToFind and completionUrl per Grayjay auth docs
6: Fix description field returning boolean instead of string on some posts
7: Channels are now categories instead of authors
8: Category shown as creator on videos, human authors moved to description
9: Fix search using correct query parameter, add default logo for categories without an image
10: Add comment section support with replies
11: Distinguish expired session from missing subscription in premium error messages
13: Use local logo.jpg as default thumbnail
14: Re-add cookiesToFind with laravel_session and remember_web_ cookies
16: Populate video duration on content detail page from Rumble embedJS response
